# Class: DirectoryAccessor

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/result/directory.ts:97](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/result/directory.ts#L97)

Read-only accessor for a directory produced by a spec action.

Assertions go through `expect()` (async — they walk the disk):
`await expect(result.directory('out')).toMatch('scaffold/out')`
compares the tree against the fixture directory `expected/<name>/`.

## Constructors

### Constructor

```ts
new DirectoryAccessor(
   absPath, 
   testDir, 
   captures?): DirectoryAccessor;
```
